title: [codereview-pass3] new code in add_route lacks use of full DAO path and may cause duplicate route entries or incorrect nexthop for multi-hop
description: The delegation in gateway.rs uses single nexthop but DAO path can have multiple hops; also no dedup or check for existing. P2. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-fy9q
close_reason: Updated add_route for full DAO path, dedup logic per rpl conventions in all impls; channel selection/sync and forwarding bugs resolved; no comments, lints/tests/builds clean, no test changes
